title: CI: fix system_test_aarch64 dependencies
body:
It should depend on aarch64 *validate*, not just build.

(Noticed by accident while reviewing Macintosh CI graph)

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```
